## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why is it the right change? Link issues. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New rule (include rule ID and one-line rationale)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (ruff, mypy --strict, pytest)
- [ ] New behavior has tests (rules: ≥1 positive + ≥1 negative case)
- [ ] `examples/clean` still produces zero findings
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under **Unreleased**
- [ ] `docs/rules.md` regenerated if rules changed (`make docs-rules`)
